esp32_i2c_begin.message0: Initialize I2C communication SDA pin%1 SCL pin%2 Frequency%3 kHz
esp32_i2c_begin.tooltip: Initialize ESP32's I2C communication, set SDA and SCL pins and communication frequency

esp32_i2c_begin_simple.tooltip: Initialize ESP32's I2C communication using default pins

esp32_i2c_scan_devices.tooltip: Scan and return the number of discovered I2C devices

esp32_i2c_begin_transmission.tooltip: Start sending data to the device with the specified I2C address

esp32_i2c_write_byte.tooltip: Write one byte of data to the I2C device

esp32_i2c_write_string.tooltip: Write string data to I2C device

esp32_i2c_end_transmission.tooltip: End I2C data sending and return error code (0 indicates success)

esp32_i2c_request_from.tooltip: Requests a specified number of bytes of data from a specified I2C device

esp32_i2c_available.message0: Number of bytes that can be read by I2C
esp32_i2c_available.tooltip: Returns the number of bytes that can be read in the I2C receive buffer

esp32_i2c_read.tooltip: Read one byte of data from the I2C receive buffer

esp32_i2c_slave_begin.message0: Initialize I2C slave mode address %1 SDA pin %2 SCL pin %3
esp32_i2c_slave_begin.tooltip: Initialize the I2C slave mode of ESP32 and set the slave device address and pins

esp32_i2c_on_receive.tooltip: Set the callback function when the I2C slave device receives data

esp32_i2c_on_request.message0: When the master device requests data %1 %2
esp32_i2c_on_request.tooltip: Set the callback function when the I2C slave device responds to the master device request

esp32_i2c_slave_print.tooltip: I2C slave device sends string data to the master device

esp32_i2c_write_to_device.tooltip: A simplified version of writing data to a specified I2C device

esp32_i2c_read_from_device.tooltip: Read the specified number of bytes of data from the specified I2C device
